The municipal party, just organ
ixed, according to those interested in
the movement, is revival of the citi-
zens' party of last year.


It was as a member of the citizens
party that the prohibitionists' may
orally candidate made so excellent
rum,

inent member of the former citizens
moxemnf "forestalled us by putting
a ticket into the field before we were
quite ready. Our committee waited
upon them and urged them to with
draw, but received the reply that the
citizens party could join in and sup
port the prohibition candidate if they
wished or could stay out, but that
the prohibition party would not with
draw its candidate. The citizens
party had to chime in with the pro-
hibitionists.
